content: {"businessRules": ["Recursive dependency extraction supporting ref(), vh(), and children/hijos references.", "Cycle detection and duplicate ID validation in the dependency graph.", "Bidirectional calculation engine using Decimal.js for precision and expr-eval for formula parsing."], "business_logic": "L\u00f3gica de negocio para index.", "dependencies": ["decimal.js", "expr-eval", "./formula-utils"], "domain": "Engine", "exports": ["extractDependencies", "validateFicha", "calculateFicha"], "id": "src/lib/cost-engine/index.ts", "name": "index.ts", "technical_description": "M\u00f3dulo t\u00e9cnico index.", "user_description": "M\u00f3dulo del sistema para gestionar index.ts."}
